name: Ohio Style Chili
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine sausage, beef, onion, garlic, chile powder, and bay leaves in a stockpot over moderate flame.
2. Heat and stir for 10-15 minutes until browned.
3. Add remaining ingredients and simmer for 1-1/2 to 2 hours.
4. Serve hot, garnished with a dollop of sour cream as desired.
